description_long: This is a roughly rectangular slab of stone featuring a prominent bas-relief carving of a bird with outstretched wings on its front face. The carving is stylized, with clear outlines and some internal details such as feathers and the bird's eye, giving it an ancient or medieval appearance. The stone itself is off-white, with a slightly irregular, chipped perimeter and a visibly rough, weathered texture. The back of the slab is flat and undecorated, showing some diagonal striations, likely from cutting or shaping. The sides are uneven and show the natural breakage of stone, with no additional ornamentation. This object appears to be a decorative or commemorative stone, possibly used as a marker or architectural element in an urban or historical setting.
description: A rectangular, off-white stone slab with a carved bird in bas-relief on its front, featuring rough, weathered edges and a flat, undecorated back.
description_view_0: The front view displays the detailed bas-relief carving of a bird with outstretched wings, occupying most of the stone's surface.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the slab's thin profile and rough, chipped edges, with the carving's depth faintly visible.
description_view_2: The back view shows a flat, undecorated surface with diagonal striations and no visible carvings or ornamentation.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the stone's thickness and irregular, natural edge, similar to the left side.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or incorporated into a commemorative wall
attribute_pattern: Features a prominent bas-relief carving of a bird, with no natural veining but clear artificial lines and shapes; the pattern is regular and visually striking.
attribute_weathering: The stone is rough and chipped at the edges, with a weathered surface indicating exposure to the elements over time.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with modern urban materials but may blend with other historical or decorative stonework; typically stands out as a focal point or marker.
